---
title: "About"
---

## Profile

I am a data analytics professional with over 6 years of experience delivering enterprise reporting, data integration, and analytics solutions across multiple industries.

My work focuses on transforming fragmented data and manual reporting into reliable, scalable analytics systems that support operational and strategic decision making. I have experience building analytics products, improving data governance, and delivering solutions that create measurable business impact.

I am particularly interested in how analytics, systems, and governance work together to enable effective data driven organisations.

## Strengths I bring to teams

-   **Business translation**: connecting business needs to metrics and analytics solutions\
-   **Data systems and integration**: designing scalable data pipelines and reporting environments\
-   **Data governance and quality**: ensuring consistency, reliability, and trust in data\
-   **Stakeholder engagement**: aligning requirements, managing expectations, and driving adoption

## Experience snapshot

-   Data & Reporting Specialist Manager – Centratama Group (2022–2024)\
    Led enterprise reporting transformation and data governance implementation\
-   Data Engineer / Tableau Expert – BCI Central (2020–2022)\
    Contributed to the development and scaling of the Analytix analytics product\
-   BI & Data Warehouse – Asahimas Flat Glass (2018–2020)\
    Implemented BI solutions across multiple departments to digitise reporting processes

## Currently

Master of Business Analytics (Monash University), Australia Awards Scholar.  
Building advanced capabilities in analytics, data science, and scalable data systems.  
Also serving as an ILLA Ambassador, supporting Indonesian language learning and cross-cultural communication.
